metadata.title: Rhiannon
metadata.lyrics:
[00:15.30] Rhiannon rings like a bell through the night
[00:18.22] And wouldn't you love to love her?

[00:25.54] And who will be her lover?
[00:29.74] All your life you've never seen

[00:37.76] Would you stay if she promised you heaven?
